reference: I went climbing yesterday and this morning I felt a sharp pain on my left side of my stomach, and the pain is slowly moving to my lower abdomen. I managed to go and pass some stool this afternoon; however, I realized that there was some clear mucus coming out of my rectum.
text: I went climbing yesterday, and this morning I felt a sharp pain on my left side of my stomach, and the pain is slowly moving to my lower abdomen. I managed to go and pass some stool this afternoon; however, I realized that there was some clear mucus coming out of my rectum.
